import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let haystack = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end
  let needle = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end
  if string.contains(haystack, needle)
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
  Ok(())
end
